name: GOLFTEC Bellevue
about: GOLFTEC Bellevue is an indoor golf training center focused on instruction, club fitting, and practice. The facility features private bays equipped with advanced simulator technology, utilizing high-speed video analysis and launch monitors to provide data-driven feedback. It offers a controlled environment for golfers to work on their swing mechanics with the guidance of professional coaches. As a corporate training center, the atmosphere is oriented toward serious improvement rather than social entertainment, though practice memberships are available for independent use. The venue also provides custom club fitting services and sells golf equipment from major brands.
why_golfers_like_it: Certified professional coaches for personalized lessons
Advanced OPTIMOTION motion measurement and video analysis
Custom club fitting with launch monitors
Structured game plans and performance tracking

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for lessons and fittings
Displayed in imagery for practice bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You do not need to bring your own clubs; GOLFTEC provides clubs for use during lessons and fittings. However, bringing your own set is recommended for fittings to ensure the new equipment matches your current specs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you can typically bring non-alcoholic beverages or snacks to your bay, as this is a training center without a restaurant or bar on-site.

faq.question: How long does a session take?
faq.answer: A standard Swing Evaluation or lesson typically lasts 60 minutes. Practice sessions vary based on your membership or booked time, usually ranging from 30 to 60 minutes.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers coaching programs specifically for juniors and youth. The facility is welcoming to beginners and younger golfers looking to learn the game in a controlled environment.
